title: ACL assessment configuration
description: Target + authentication configuration for the READ-ONLY ADLS ACL assessment engine.

tenantId.description: Entra tenant GUID or verified domain.

subscriptionId.description: Azure subscription GUID containing the storage account.

resourceGroupName.description: Resource group of the storage account. Optional; required only to capture existing Azure RBAC assignments.

rootPath.description: Path within the filesystem to start the scan.

mode.description: interactive = sign-in prompt; sas = read+list SAS for the ADLS data plane.

sasToken.description: Read+list SAS token; used only when mode = sas. Real values belong only in the git-ignored config.json.

graphScopes.description: Microsoft Graph READ scopes used to enumerate groups, memberships, and users.

namePrefixes.description: Only enumerate groups whose displayName starts with one of these prefixes. Empty = all groups referenced by ACEs.

expandTransitiveMembership.description: Resolve effective membership through nested groups.

includeDefaultAces.description: Capture default (inherited) ACEs in addition to access ACEs.

includeRbacAssignments.description: Capture existing Azure RBAC data-plane role assignments (expected empty for ACL-only estates).

checkpointPath.description: Resume file so large scans can stop/restart without re-walking.
